Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. MARCUS BRADLEY, Esq. of Bradley/Grombacher, LLP (tel: 805-270-7100) for Plaintiff.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ALLEN TAYLOR's MOTION TO DISMISS.

Order signed (see signed order for complete ruling).
